features.name: Verify Anthropic API Access
features.description: Verify ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and Claude API is accessible. Run the validation command below.

validation.test_command: python3 -c "import os; assert os.environ.get('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'), 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set'; print('OK')"

features.name: Verify Browser Agent End-to-End
features.description: 3-stage verification: (1) health check, (2) /diagnose navigates to codespace URL + screenshot, (3) direct URL reachability. Run: python3 tests/integration/test_browser_agent.py

validation.success_criteria: All 3 stages pass: health OK, /diagnose navigates and screenshots codespace URL, direct URL reachable
